primary_hypothesis: Median portfolio alpha (vs SPY total return over position time_window_days) increases monotonically: A ≤ B ≤ C ≤ D, with D−A > 0 at p < 0.05 via paired bootstrap (10,000 resamples).
secondary_hypotheses: H2: Detected cycles (detected_cycles table, reinforcement >= 0.5) persist (remain un-corrected in the market) for >= 14 days in ≥ 2 of 9 known cycles.
H3: Cross-silo collisions (domain_distance >= 0.60) produce higher adjusted_score than within-silo (< 0.30) by >= 10 points on average.
H4: Chain depth d=3 hypotheses outperform d=1 hypotheses in realised alpha with effect size Cohen's d >= 0.3.

null_baselines.name: random_pair_control
null_baselines.method: Randomly pair N facts from distinct source types. Run the full pipeline. Compare alpha to strata B.

null_baselines.name: within_silo_control
null_baselines.method: Run pipeline forcing both facts to share source_type. Compare alpha to strata A.

null_baselines.name: shuffle_label_control
null_baselines.method: Shuffle the source_type labels on facts before running. Compare alpha.

decision_rules.primary_wins: D − A > 0, p < 0.05, monotonicity holds. Accept compositional alpha hypothesis.
decision_rules.primary_loses: D ≤ B OR monotonicity violated. Reject. Write null-result paper.
must_not_do: Do not add new facts to the corpus after the cutoff.
Do not change scoring weights after the cutoff.
Do not swap primary endpoint for secondary if primary fails.
Do not exclude hypotheses retroactively for 'quality'.
Report ALL 4 strata outcomes even if one is embarrassing.

power_analysis.notes: Power analysis assumes Cohen's d = 0.3, alpha = 0.05, power = 0.80. If a stratum < 30, need to run more cycles.
